rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Aug 8, 2018 line 1. INTERVENOR UMPQUA BANK Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment is continued to August 21, 2018. CCP 170.6 challenge to the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICE DARK ET AL VS. PAUL THIBEAULT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Aug 8, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT PAUL THIBEAULT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT The demurrer to common counts is overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges the at least some of the loans have been memorialized in writing and confirmed on June 27, 2013. Demurrer to the remaining causes of action is sustained as follows: (1) Causes of action 2-6 are abated as to the executor pending the resolution of the Partition action. Plaintiff fails to allege any basis of liability of the executor pertaining to the property claims other than vague assertion the estate may be a co-owner of the property under certain circumstances. (See moving papers). This is inconsistent with positions taken in partition action re: 50/50 ownership by the plaintiff and the Trust. (2) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action 2-6 to the extent they are asserted against the trustee. While Plaintiff includes "successors in interest of her estate" as a new defendant, Plaintiff confirms in opposition that this characterization refers to the Trustee. Trustee's demurrer has previously been sustained. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERAN LI VS. ELBA GOUSSEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Aug 8, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT ELBA GOUSSEN Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Answer DENIED. Moving party's delay in bringing this motion is prejudicial to Plaintiff in light of trial on August 13, 2018. There is no time left to conduct discovery and prepare for trial in the time remaining. Moving party fails to explain why this motion was not filed until July 17, 2018 (Defendant appeared ex-parte seeking an OST for this motion on July 6, 2018 but failed to file the motion for the next 11 days). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA SIMON VS. JOHN FERRUCCI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Aug 8, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN FERRUCCI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1112. Additionally, the Court exercises its discretion under CCP 437c(e) as Defendant appears to be the sole witness (with capacity) to the formation of and performance under the rental agreement for the in-law unit. = (501/REQ)
